item.name: Driftdowns Trout
item.description:
This blighted wavekin ekes out an existence in the depths of the driftdowns, where it hunts for prey in the polluted substrate.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This trout species somehow survives in the stagnant, waste-filled sediment of the driftdowns. Unsurprisingly, its highly polluted flesh is entirely unsuitable for consumption.
